CMB_TT_TE_EE.required_output: predicted TT TE EE spectra and residual vector

CMB_LENSING.required_output: predicted CMB lensing bandpowers and residual vector

BAO_DISTANCES.required_output: predicted DM_over_rd, DH_over_rd, DV_over_rd by redshift bin

SNIA_DISTANCES.required_output: predicted distance moduli and Hubble residuals

WEAK_LENSING_AND_CLUSTERING.required_output: predicted xi_plus, xi_minus, w_theta, gamma_t, and nuisance-aware residual vector

CLUSTER_ABUNDANCE.required_output: predicted cluster-count and mass-calibration residual vector

admissibility_rule: DFM predictions remain inadmissible until observable prediction rules map the supplied DFM equations and parameter map into each required cosmological observable channel before likelihood execution.
boundary: Does not supply DFM field equations.
Does not supply DFM action functional.
Does not supply DFM parameter map.
Does not supply DFM observable prediction rules.
Does not supply channel projection rules.
Does not supply residual vector rules.
Does not supply covariance compatibility rules.
